---
title: "LIBRE presentation for Horizon 2020"
date: 2014-02-14
description: "Slides from my presentation of Open Scholar and the LIBRE project at the Information Days on Horizon 2020 in Brussels."
categories: [Talks & Presentations, LIBRE, Open Scholar, Science policy]
aliases:
  - /2014/02/14/libre-presentation-for-horizon-2020/
---

Today I made a brief presentation of Open Scholar and the LIBRE project at the <a href="http://ec.europa.eu/digital-agenda/en/news/information-days-horizon-2020-research-infrastructures-work-programme-2014-2015-focus-e" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer noopener">Information Days on Horizon 2020</a> that was held in Brussels from 12–14 of February. I had the chance to receive first hand information about the e-Infrastructures calls, listen to many interesting proposals and discuss about possible collaborations with potential partners.

Below the slides of my own presentation published under a creative commons attribution licence:

<iframe src="https://www.slideshare.net/slideshow/embed_code/key/infrastructures-infoday-brusselsfinal" width="100%" height="485" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" allowfullscreen style="max-width:600px; display:block; margin: 1.5rem auto;"></iframe>
